summary: Comprehensive testing of StoryCraft AI MVP completed. Backend APIs working well (82.4% success rate) with only timeout issues on job status and dashboard stats. Frontend excellent with successful auth flow, CRUD operations, navigation, and UI quality. Fixed nested button React warning.

performance_issues.issue: Request timeout during job status check
performance_issues.impact: Users may not see real-time generation progress

performance_issues.issue: Request timeout when fetching dashboard statistics

performance_issues.impact: Story deletion may appear to fail

authentication_issues.issue: Provided test credentials return 401 - user may not exist in database

ui_bugs.issue: React hydration warning - nested button elements (FIXED)
ui_bugs.resolution: Changed outer button to div with cursor-pointer

passed_tests: Character CRUD operations (create, read, update, delete)
Landing page hero section and CTA buttons
action_item_for_main_agent: 1. Investigate backend timeout issues on job status and dashboard stats endpoints - may need query optimization or async handling. 2. Create the testuser@storycraft.com user in database if needed for testing. 3. Consider adding loading states for slow endpoints.
